institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Fajardo

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 48% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Fajardo vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 2.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Fajardo fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (11.8% → 7.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Fajardo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Fajardo rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (63.8% → 76.3%).
